description: The Architectural Pivot: Clean Architecture, Security Hardening, and Glassmorphic UI.
features: Redesigned Product Catalog with Interactive Overlays
changelog: Refactored core modules to decoupled Clean Architecture
Implemented Stellar Dark Mode with Indigo/Emerald palette
Added 2FA secure login flow and lockout logic
Configured automated builds and linting via GitHub Actions
Updated typography to Outfit and Inter fonts
Unified all security logic into hardened AuthService

description: Beta release for internal stakeholder testing with initial product catalog.
changelog: Launched beta testing phase
Implemented basic product search and filtering
Fixed critical session management bugs
Synchronized README and CHANGELOG

description: Production Hardening Phase: CI/CD, Legal Compliance, Clean Architecture, and Enhanced UX.
features: Background GPS Service with Persistent Storage
Enhanced UI/UX: Transitions, Skeleton Loading, Toast Notifications
MR Expense Claims with Multi-Photo Receipt Upload
changelog: Implemented BackgroundGpsService for continuous MR tracking
Added mandatory <50m GPS accuracy validation
Created Product Catalog with Clean Architecture pattern
Built Distribution & Marketing Management system
Added Privacy Policy and Terms of Service for Nepal market
Enhanced UX with page transitions and skeleton loading
Implemented toast notification system
Setup CI/CD pipeline with automated testing
Standardized project structure with barrel exports
Added MR Dashboard API integration (GET /api/mr/dashboard)
Implemented Expense submission with photo upload (POST /api/mr/expenses)
Created Accountant Expense Reconciliation workflow
Built real-time stock validation for order approval
Configured GitHub Pages deployment for web demo

description: App Gallery & Visual Showcase: Transitioning to the Master Production Roadmap.
changelog: Initialized the 5-Pillar Production Roadmap
Created reusable GlassmorphicBackground component
Implemented GlassmorphicGalleryCarousel widget
Synchronized TODO/README/CHANGELOG documentation
Refactored MR role with premium design system
Implemented high-accuracy mandatory GPS capture
Built interactive route planning for field force
Started Prisma model consolidation for SalesOrders

description: Main Feature Release: Enterprise Pharmaceutical Distribution Platform for Nepal.
changelog: Added Background GPS polling (10m accuracy)
Implemented full Order Lifecycle management
Added VAT Return system for IRDN compliance
Created Accountant and MR Dashboards
Premium Slate & Indigo Design System

description: Enhanced UI/UX with modern design system and improved navigation.
changelog: Implemented comprehensive AppTheme
Added Lottie success/error animations
Created Version Showcase carousel
Optimized navigation rail with animations
Enhanced error handling and loading states
